  "findings": [
    "Gas flex connector routed directly through the water heater cabinet wall, creating a sharp-edge shear and wear hazard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on the gas line connection.",
    "Install a rigid black iron pipe nipple through the cabinet jacket to the exterior.",
    "Connect the flexible gas connector outside of the appliance cabinet."
  ],
  "rationale": "Routing a flexible gas connector through an appliance cabinet wall is a major safety violation. The sharp metal edges of the cabinet sheet metal can vibrate and cut through the flexible connector, causing a catastrophic gas leak. The connection must transition to rigid pipe before passing through the cabinet wall.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 504",
    "IRC P2804",
    "NFPA 54",
    "IFGC 411"
  ]
}
